holdings.infoBox: ILF is an equity ETF with a total of 58 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vale S.A. stock at 9.01%, Nu Holdings at 7.47%, Itaú Unibanco Holding at 6.76%, GRUPO MEXICO B at 6.10%, and Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. - Petrobras at 5.35%.

overview.description: The iShares Latin America 40 ETF (ILF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Latin America 40 index, a market-cap-weighted index of 40 of the largest Latin American firms. ILF was launched on Oct 25, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
